title: 🚨 Bug Report & Reward Program
message: If you find any bugs or issues while using ONCHYRA, report them and get rewarded! 💰 📧 Email: onchyra@gmail.com Please include a brief description of the issue and, if possible, attach a screenshot. 🎁 Valid bug reports will receive ONC rewards based on severity. Help us improve ONCHYRA and earn at the same time 🚀

title: ONCHYRA Ecosystem Update 🚀
message: The latest ONCHYRA upgrade is now complete. Deposits, withdrawals, OTP verification, booster packages, leadership rewards, matching bonuses, and 3-level referral commissions are now live. The ecosystem has also crossed 100+ users and 200+ ONC mined, marking another important milestone in the growth of the network.
